steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content:
The line passes through $(0,19)$, so its $y$-intercept is $19$. The slope is 
$$
-\frac{1}{4}
$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: Use slope-intercept form. $$y=mx+b$$ Substitute $$ m=-\frac{1}{4} $$ and $b=19$. $$y=-\frac{1}{4}x+19$$ The answer is B.
